name: ai-context entry
purpose: Stable AI entrypoint. Read JSON indexes first, then load source markdown/rules/skills only when selected by task context.
defaultReadOrder: config/skills/skills.json only when skill selection is needed
config/rules/rules.json only when rule lookup is needed

sourceReadPolicy.projectDocs: Read docs/repos/*.md only after a project JSON is selected and the summary is insufficient.
sourceReadPolicy.scenes: Read docs/scenes/*.md only after a scene JSON is selected and detailed workflow text is needed.
sourceReadPolicy.rules: Read bundles/rules/** only when a selected project JSON lists the rule and the task needs full rule details.
sourceReadPolicy.skills: Read bundles/skills/** only when a selected project JSON or explicit user request triggers the skill.
sourceReadPolicy.profile: Read docs/person/profile.md only when long-term preferences or project map details matter.

taskFlow.currentWorkMarkdown: deprecated; do not read or update runtime/current-work.md
